response:
paragraph 1  
a condition known as hypothyroidism can lead to a lack of fetal growth or visible pregnancy symptoms  
the thyroid gland produces hormones that regulate metabolism and fetal development  
hypothyroidism can be treated with thyroid hormone replacement therapy  

paragraph 2  
a woman with hypothyroidism may not show signs of pregnancy or have a small fetus  
this condition can affect both the mother and the developing baby  
the treatment is monitored by a healthcare professional to ensure safety and effectiveness
